Notes: Integrated PCB antenna; no external antenna required
I2C addr 0x40; reset_on_boot: false to preserve energy accumulator
Both address pins to GND → I2C addr 0x40
LOAD_OUT → R5 → U2 pin9 VBUS. RC pole with C9 at 160kHz
C4=3.3V; C5/C6=ESP32; C7=buck HF; C9=INA228 VBUS filter (with R5)
τ=10ms with R8 10kΩ. MUST be 1µF — not 100nF
WARNING: disconnect 12V before connecting USB — VBUS tied to LOAD_OUT
